case_title: EILEEN BULGER VS. AMANDA WILSON et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BULGER, EILEEN SERVED FEB-04-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, AMANDA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BULGER, EILEEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILSON, AMANDA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: A PORTION OF 91 CANYON DRIVE, (A BEDROOM AND ACCESS TO COMMON AREAS OF THE UNIT AND THE BUILDING)SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94112 (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BULGER, EILEEN AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, AMANDA DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, AMANDA
